description: core-claude baseline guards, registered BY THE PLUGIN so they update with it. PreToolUse: judge-hook on every tool call (the hook classifies the tool itself, and its rules ship in judge-rules.json beside it; ~/.claude/judge-rules.json stays supported as an overlay). PostToolUse: writing-guard on write/edit tools plus their skyline equivalents. Stop: research-nudge on hedged factual claims. Until 2026-07-24 these three were COPIES that /core-claude:setup dropped into ~/.claude and wired by absolute path in settings.json, so a plugin update never reached the running hook; the setup skill now removes that wiring instead of writing it. Commands use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so the scripts and their rules resolve inside the installed plugin.
